External Runtimes
Runtimes connect RockoAgents to external systems — CLI tools, HTTP agent services, webhooks, and local scripts. Define them in project.json → "runtimes" and they appear here automatically.
No runtimes defined — add a "runtimes" section to project.json

External Runtimes
Runtimes are external agent systems configured in project.json → runtimes. Supported types: cli · http · webhook · mcp. Risk levels: read_only · write · deploy · financial (last two require human approval).
